_comment: Per-wiki settings read by the hooks. Every key is optional; omitted keys use built-in defaults (see hooks/wikilib.py). This file is versioned WITH your content so it syncs across machines.
_comment_types: type_requirements keys must match YOUR type: vocabulary (KNOWLEDGE.md 'Types'); a key matching no type silently never fires.
_comment_lifecycle: Local auto-commit is on by default. Network push is opt-in; shared wikis should normally disable auto_commit and use reviewed commits/PRs.
_comment_inbox: Both 0 (disabled) by default. Set either to a positive number to get a soft-cap advisory (never blocks) when STATE.md's ## Inbox section grows past it.
_comment_drift: 0 (disabled) by default. Set to a day count to flag a page whose last real git edit is newer than its reviewed:/timestamp: by more than that many days.
